case_title: JEFFREY S ORGAIN VS. NEXCYCLE RECOVERY, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORGAIN, JEFFREY S AS TO DEFENDANT NEXCYCLE RECOVERY, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA 20/20 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
